allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle")
Bash(python -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\('pomodoro.py', doraise=True\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")

statusLine.command: python -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cwd=os.path.basename(d.get('cwd','')); model=d.get('model','?'); ctx=d.get('contextWindow',{}); pct=round((1-ctx.get('used',0)/max(ctx.get('total',1),1))*100); print(f'\U0001f4c1 {cwd}  |  \U0001f916 {model}  |  \U0001f4ca {pct}%')"
